overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting an ancient Greek warrior standing on a high stone terrace overlooking the city of Delphi. The camera performs a slow panoramic sweep around the stationary character, revealing classical architecture, bronze statues, and temple facades before transitioning to a plaza view with the location name displayed.

scene_state.functional_zone: high stone terrace overlooking ancient city

events.description: camera begins slow panoramic pan to the right, moving away from the character
view shifts from wide city panorama to focus on rocky hillside with distant temple structures

agents.ego_description: Spartan warrior stands motionless on wooden platform, holding a large round shield with blue emblem, overlooking the ancient city below

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a viewing platform on the stone terrace
dense cluster of ancient Greek buildings with terracotta rooftops sprawling across the valley
steep rocky terrain with sparse greenery framing the overlook
hazy blue mountains visible on the horizon beyond the city

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a high stone terrace with a wooden platform overlooking the sprawling ancient Greek city of Delphi. The camera begins a slow panoramic pan to the right, revealing the dense cluster of terracotta rooftops, distant mountains, and the hazy blue sea beyond, with rocky cliffs framing the left side of the vista.

scene_state.functional_zone: sacred terrace with classical statues and temple facade

events.description: camera moves from open city overlook to enclosed terrace walkway lined with bronze statues
camera completes panoramic arc and reveals the player character standing near the temple entrance

agents.ego_description: character remains stationary on the terrace while camera circles around, eventually revealing them from behind near a bronze statue

entered.detail: tall bronze statue of a robed figure holding a staff on a decorated stone pedestal
grand temple with tall ionic columns, triangular pediment, and blue decorative banners
single decorative stone pillar with ornate capital
long blue fabric banners hanging between the temple columns
bronze statue of a figure with arm outstretched, standing on a pedestal with relief carvings
mature olive tree with gnarled trunk and silvery-green leaves

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning along the stone terrace walkway, passing by bronze statues of robed figures on pedestals and approaching a grand classical temple with tall columns and blue banners. The marble terrace floor and decorative stone columns come into view as the camera completes its arc, eventually revealing the player character standing near a second bronze statue.

scene_state.functional_zone: sacred plaza with row of statues and ancient ruins

events.description: fade to black and cut to new location showing the Delphi sanctuary plaza from elevated perspective
text 'DELPHI' appears on screen identifying the location

agents.ego_description: camera observes the sacred plaza from an elevated position, showing the layout of statues and temples without the player character visible

notable_agents.action: small group of people walking near the temple entrance in the distance

entered.detail: line of seven stone statues of robed figures standing on a raised platform
ruined temple with standing columns and partial walls
trees with orange and yellow autumn foliage surrounding the plaza
simple wooden structure with blue fabric canopy
large circular stone basin, possibly a fountain or sacrificial area

segments.scene_description: After a brief fade to black, the scene transitions to a different elevated view of a sacred plaza featuring a row of stone statues lining a path, ancient temple ruins, and autumn-colored trees. The text 'DELPHI' appears on screen, identifying the location as the camera surveys the archaeological site with scattered visitors visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a sweeping panoramic view of an ancient cityscape and transitions into a wide survey of a sacred archaeological plaza. It begins on a high stone terrace, panning right to reveal the terracotta rooftops of Delphi set against a backdrop of distant mountains and a hazy blue sea. As the camera continues its arc along the marble walkway, it passes bronze statues and grand classical columns adorned with blue banners before settling on the player character. The scene then shifts to an elevated perspective of a sacred plaza, where the environment transforms into a landscape of temple ruins and autumn-colored trees. Finally, the camera surveys the site as the text DELPHI appears on screen, overlooking a path lined with stone statues and scattered visitors in the distance.
